{{Quote|I hardwired [her] into ship to act as co-pilot. Sadly, also has ethics circuits which are useless and most aggravating...|[[Vilmarh Grahrk]]|<ref name="Star Wars (1998) 20">[[Star Wars (1998) 20|''Star Wars'' (1998) 20]]</ref>}}
'''NT 600''' was an [[Astronavigation droid|astronavigation]] and general assistance [[Droid/Legends|droid]] that was hardwired into the [[Inferno (Vilmarh Grahrk)|''Inferno'']], [[Vilmarh Grahrk]]'s personal starship. Also known as just NT, she could detach from the ''Inferno'' and operate as an independent unit. NT was pre-programmed with ethics circuits, which her [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] master found to be quite annoying. She was also quite fond of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]], to whom she had given access to the ship's systems. She was made at the [[Golden Nyss Shipyards]].
